rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §12.1011, which governs charter school authorization for high-performing entities. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 12.1011. CHARTER AUTHORIZATION FOR HIGH-PERFORMING ENTITIES.
_note: Rule text concerns open-enrollment charter school authorization; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection.
